description_long: This is a double-bladed battle axe with a robust, dark metallic head featuring two wide, symmetrical blades that curve outward and taper to sharp points. The blade surfaces have a rugged, slightly matte finish, suggesting heavy-duty use or a forged appearance. The central section where the blades meet is reinforced and thick, providing structural strength. The handle is straight, cylindrical, and appears to be made of wood with a dark brown hue, wrapped with subtle bands for improved grip. The transition between the handle and the blade is reinforced with a metallic collar, enhancing durability. The overall design is imposing and functional, suitable for display or practical use in urban settings such as themed parks, garages, or as a prop.
description: A double-bladed, dark metallic axe with a straight wooden handle and rugged, symmetrical blades. The design is robust and functional, with reinforced details and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing both wide, symmetrical blades and the full length of the handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blades and the cylindrical handle.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the back of the blades and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin blade profile and handle alignment.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical wooden handle with subtle grip bands, dark brown, no visible curvature.
attribute_blade_design: Double-bladed, wide and symmetrical with outward curves, sharp edges, and a reinforced central section.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with a metallic collar reinforcement.
